name: Astro [DANDY’S WORLD]
description:
Wet dreams (now with co-op mode)

image change bc yeah that was goofy

Astro’s dreams are boring, so he likes to go to other people’s dreams to see what goes on in their unconscious minds. However, when he decides to spectate your dream, it seems he’s already starring in it.

Why do I have no ideas this one is so bad

It was literally between this and Astro getting a hat boner so if u want that lmk or something

Can u tell this was made in like 10 minutes
